title: NTM texture patch for shaders
description: Fix for some NTM textures to work correctly with shaders
body:
# DEPRECATED: Included in [Shader fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/shader-fixer) since 4.3

---

Hbm's NTM has some textures that have a black background.

In the game itself, this is handled by OpenGL functions (glBlend/glAlphaFunc).

However, some shaders may not support this behavior, which results in this black background.

This resource pack fixes this by making the background of these textures truly transparent.

(Demonstrations of fixes are available in the "Gallery" tab)
